reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the chat response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut interface with agent list in sidebar.
Clicked on "QA-20260721-024823-uk0i" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface ready for input.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input field — Message appeared in the text box.
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Title Lookup Session" created.
Waited for agent response (waited up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed processing in 14 seconds, "Working..." status disappeared.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"" and confirms "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully and its title/main heading is \"Example Domain\". Browser closed."
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete agent response with "Example Domain" clearly visible.
